string.text:
The MP-153 smoothbore multi-shot shotgun, manufactured by IzhMekh ("Izhevsky Mechanical Plant"). A reliable and practical hunting and self-defense weapon.
 This particular weapon has a Picatinny rail, and the barrel accepts a suppresor.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: Most optics for the Picatinny/weaver system
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Suppressor: Salvo Suppressor
